name: smartsheets
description: Reads and writes Smartsheet sheets, rows, folders, reports, dashboards, users, webhooks, attachments, discussions, proofs, update requests, and workspace metadata.

risk.read: external Smartsheet API read of sheets, rows, folders, reports, dashboards, users, shares, webhooks, attachments, discussions, proofs, update requests, workspaces, and event metadata
risk.write: creates, updates, copies, moves, publishes, shares, and deletes Smartsheet business objects including rows, sheets, reports, folders, comments, attachments, proofs, update requests, webhooks, and workspaces; destructive deletes require approval
risk.approval: reverse ETL writes require plan preview and approval token
